title: [CI:DOCS] fix: add missing space
body:
Fixes a small typo in the man page. :slightly_smiling_face:

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
The git commit messages should sign like the command:
```
git commit -s -m 'xxx'
```

That's a thing you cannot do on GitHub. Anyway, if you think this is important even for such a minor pull request/change, well… I now did the inconvenient way of cloning the repo and force-pushing.

Next time, you can maybe just squash-merge the PR and there adjust the commit message as you like. That's way easier for anyone involved and would likely make it easier for contributors.

BTW, your PR docs exclusion does not seem to work:
> In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

The PR has this title, but all tests are still triggered, are not they?

> BTW, your PR docs exclusion does not seem to work:
> 
> The PR has this title, but all tests are still triggered, are not they?

It does work, normal PRs run the full test suite with 50+ tests. CI:DOCS will only run the essential tests.

The sign-off-by line is a legal requirement, see https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan*, *rugk* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
